title: French Steamed Paella
description: A French twist on the classic Spanish dish, steaming the paella for a lighter and fluffier texture. This recipe serves 4 and is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Rinse the paella and cut it into 1-inch pieces.
Prepare the steamer by filling the bottom of a large pot with water and bringing it to a boil.
Reduce the heat to a simmer, and place the steamer basket into the pot.
Add the paella to the steamer basket, cover, and steam for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
